news.headline: Pakistan plans to achieve IMF target without increasing burden on taxpayers, according to latest report.

Global Aircraft Fuel Cell Market to reach USD 4995.57 Million by 2034 at a 10.76% CAGR from USD 1797.86 Million in 2024. Factors driving growth include concerns about climate change, demand for sustainable fuel alternatives, aircraft modernization, and increasing adoption of personal jets. Key regions for growth include Asia Pacific and North America. The industry is also facing challenges due to high costs, skilled labor shortages, stringent regulations, and complex design processes.
news.summary: The global Aircraft Fuel Cell Market is projected to have significant growth, with a value of around USD 1987.45 Million in 2025 and expected to reach USD 4995.57 Million by 2034, at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 10.76%. Aircraft fuel cells, which convert chemical energy to electrical energy, are gaining traction due to concerns about climate change, the demand for sustainable alternatives, and the push for modernization in the aircraft industry. Types of fuel cells include hydrogen, methanol, and biofuels. Factors hindering market growth include high costs, lack of skilled labor, and regulatory challenges. The market is influenced by government incentives and policies for sustainable aviation, encouraging investment in fuel cell technology. The Asia Pacific region is expected to see significant growth, led by countries like China, India, and Japan, while North America is anticipated to maintain a substantial market share. Key segments include fuel type, power output, aircraft type, and region.

news.headline: 365Talents meets ISO 42001 standards, 1st HR Tech to do so. Shows commitment to ethical AI in talent management.
news.summary: In a significant development on February 18, 2025, 365Talents, a prominent player in AI-driven talent and skills intelligence services worldwide, has made history by attaining the ISO 42001 standards. This remarkable achievement highlights the company's dedication to upholding principles of transparency, responsibility, and ethics in the HR Tech sector.

news.headline: Cyrus Mozayeni MD appointed Chair of LoQus23 Therapeutics Board after £35 million Series A fundraise for Huntington's treatment.
news.summary: Renowned expert Dr. Mozayeni has been appointed for his expertise in biotech corporate strategy and business development, after a significant achievement of raising £35 million in a successful Series A fundraise by the end of 2024. This funding is intended to advance the development of MSH3 inhibitors for the treatment of Huntington's disease and progress them into clinical trials. The location for these groundbreaking advancements is in Cambridge, England, as of February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Dr. Anupama Shetty named NICU Medical Director at Miller Children's & Women's Hospital in Long Beach.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California on February 18, 2025, Miller Children's & Women's Hospital named Anupama Shetty, M.D., as the new medical director of their level IV Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU). Dr. Shetty's appointment follows her tenure in a previous position and brings her expertise to the NICU in Long Beach.

news.headline: PlanHub launches PlanHub 2.0 - preconstruction software for contractors, aiding networking and project winning.

This latest version is a comprehensive preconstruction tool aimed at assisting contractors in networking, increasing project wins, and boosting business growth.

E3 Lithium hires industry veteran Rob Knowles as VP Investor Relations, bringing 20+ years of experience. He will join effective February 18, 2025.
news.summary: E3 Lithium Ltd, a leading Canadian lithium company, is excited to announce that Rob Knowles will be joining as Vice President of Investor Relations on February 18, 2025. With over 20 years of experience in capital markets, Knowles brings a wealth of knowledge in investor relations, investment banking, and equity research. E3 Lithium, listed on TSXV as ETL, FSE as OW3, and OTCQX as EEMMF, values his expertise in attracting and maintaining investor relationships. This strategic move aims to strengthen E3 Lithium's position in the market and enhance its communication with stakeholders.

news.headline: HOOKII unveils smart robotic lawn mower with 3D LiDAR & Vision Fusion in Europe; 2X faster, 95%+ coverage.
news.summary: In Paris on February 18, 2025, HOOKII unveiled the inaugural robotic lawn mower featuring innovative 3D LiDAR & Vision Fusion technology, specifically tailored for Europe's intricate smaller gardens. Promising to deliver a 2X speedier mowing experience with over 95% coverage, HOOKII excels in effortlessly navigating around challenging obstacles like trampolines and garden features.

news.headline: Tims China introduces "Light Bagel Sandwich Lunch Box Series" in Shanghai, targeting urban consumers with healthy meal options.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, TH International Limited (NASDAQ: THCH), the sole operator of Tim Hortons coffee outlets in China, unveiled its "Light Bagel Sandwich Lunch Box Series". This launch underscores the company's dedication to delivering premium coffee and wholesome food experiences in a convenient manner. The lunch box series comprises a bagel sandwich, salad, and coffee combo, catering to city dwellers looking for healthy and convenient meal choices. This initiative taps into the rising preference for nutritious Western-style lunches among urban consumers.

American Salars acquires 18,083-hectare Brazil hard rock property with up to 3.72% Li2O in recent sampling and significant rare earth element values. Acquisition through share purchase agreement of 1447377 BC Ltd. - highly prospective project. (Word count: 29)
news.summary: American Salars Lithium Inc., a company listed under CSE: USLI, OTC: USLIF, FWB: Z3P, and WKN: A3E2NY, has recently announced a significant acquisition. They have entered into a share purchase agreement to buy all the outstanding shares of 1447377 BC Ltd., the company holding a 100% interest in the Jaguaribe Project. This project encompasses 18,083 hectares (180 sq km) of Hardrock LCT, known for containing Lithium-Cesium-Tantalum minerals, Rare Earth Elements (REE), and a variety of Critical Minerals. This acquisition marks a substantial move for American Salars in expanding its portfolio and exploration efforts in the mining sector.

news.headline: SK chemicals is establishing a Waste Plastic Recycling Innovation Center in Korea to speed up depolymerization technology commercialization.
news.summary: Seoul is advancing the commercialization of depolymerization technology by establishing a Recycling Solution Center that will integrate with current production infrastructure. This aims to validate the conversion of waste resource materials and create a complete resource circulation system across industries. The initiative focuses on building a comprehensive recycling solution center to accelerate the deployment of the technology.

news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, VIVOZON Pharmaceutical revealed on February 17 that its non-opioid pain reliever, UNAFRA Inj., containing Opiranserin HCl, was officially sanctioned on December 12, 2024. The Ministry of Food and Drug Safety gave approval for the product.

The company's innovative approach has garnered attention in the industry and highlights its excellent reputation in the market.

news.headline: Performance Brokerage Services facilitated the sale of Christiansen Motors in Audubon, Iowa from Patrick Kaiser to Bali Sandhu on Feb. 18, 2025.

The dealership was acquired by Bali Sandhu from Patrick Kaiser. This transaction took place in Audubon, Iowa on February 18th, 2025. Performance Brokerage Services, known for their significant activity in this sector, is recognized as North America's leader in dealership buy-sell deals.

news.headline: George C. Chaconas advised on the sale of Historic Harley-Davidson in Topeka, Kansas after 75 years, from Mike Patterson to Steven Towers. Performance Brokerage Services made the announcement on Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Leading dealership buy-sell facilitator, Performance Brokerage Services, has revealed the transfer of ownership of Historic Harley-Davidson in Topeka, Kansas. The sale involved Mike Patterson selling the dealership to Steven Towers. This transaction was made public on Feb. 18, 2025, in Irvine, California. Performance Brokerage Services, recognized for its high transaction volumes in North America, facilitated this change of ownership.

news.headline: Clarivate introduces subscription model for academia to offer affordable access to scholarly content.
news.summary: Breaking news out of London on February 18, 2025 reveals that Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT) has introduced a groundbreaking approach to granting widespread, easy, and cost-effective entry to credible scholarly material for educational and research purposes. This leading global provider of revolutionary intelligence has rolled out a fresh subscription model that is poised to revolutionize how individuals interact with scholarly content, promising greater accessibility and affordability across the board.

news.headline: CellPoint Digital introduces a new Payment Orchestration Platform for airlines and travel companies, meeting global travel commerce needs.
news.summary: A cutting-edge Payment Orchestration Platform has been introduced by CellPoint Digital, a leading player in the payment industry. The platform is geared towards catering to the changing demands of the worldwide travel commerce sector. Unveiled in Dallas on February 18, 2025, this innovative solution offers advanced capabilities to streamline payment processes effectively.

news.headline: Defense Metals' Wicheeda Project has robust economics with pre-tax NPV of US$1.8 billion and IRR of 24.6%, making it one of the most advanced rare earth projects in North America or Europe.
news.summary: After finalizing the Pre-Feasibility Study, Defense Metals has solidified the status of its Wicheeda Project as one of the most advanced undeveloped rare earth ventures in North America and Europe. The economic analysis of the Wicheeda Project indicates a pre-tax Net Present Value (NPV) at 8% of US$1.8 billion with an Internal Rate of Return (IRR) of 24.6%. The project shows promising figures even after taxes, positioning it as a lucrative investment opportunity in the rare earth market.

news.headline: TotalEnergies and Air Liquide partner to decarbonize refineries in Northern Europe, producing 45,000 tons/year of green hydrogen using renewables.
news.summary: In Paris, TotalEnergies has partnered with Air Liquide to work towards decarbonizing hydrogen used in its European refineries by 2030. The collaboration includes agreements to develop two projects in the Netherlands aimed at producing and delivering around 45,000 tons of green hydrogen annually. This hydrogen will be generated using renewable power, primarily sourced from the OranjeWind offshore wind farm - a joint project between TotalEnergies and RWE (50% ownership each). These initiatives are expected to significantly reduce CO2 emissions from TotalEnergies’ refineries in Be.

Fluor (NYSE: FLR) Q4 results release on Feb. 18, 2025. Expected earnings: $0.77/share, revenue: $4.42B. CFO retirement announced. Stock fell 3.4% to $43.40. Readers can view analyst ratings on Benzinga.
news.summary: Engineering and construction company Fluor Corporation (NYSE:FLR) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on Feb. 18, 2025, before the market opens. Analysts predict earnings of 77 cents per share, a rise from 68 cents in the same quarter last year. Revenue is expected to be $4.42 billion, up from $3.82 billion in Q4 of the previous year. CFO Joe Brennan has announced his retirement to be effective on July 1, 2025. Following this news, Fluor's stock closed at $43.40, a 3.4% decrease. For more details and analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

Big funds like BlackRock, Morgan Stanley, and Goldman Sachs increase GME stakes in Q4, totaling 143M shares valued at $4.5B. GameStop holds $4.6B in cash. New 10-Q filing suggests GameStop planning BTC purchase. UBS increased GME stake by 1635%, Citadel by 52%, BlackRock by 8%. Renaissance Technologies and JPMorgan Chase reduced their stakes by 57% and 56%.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, big billion-dollar funds increased their stakes in GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME). The video game retailer had $4.616 billion in cash and cash equivalents in the third quarter. About 143 million shares valued at $4.5 billion were held by 356 funds as of the fourth quarter 13F filings. UBS Group AG increased its stake by 1635% while Citadel Advisors added 52%, and BlackRock added 8%, valuing their stake at $1.091 billion. Renaissance Technologies and JPMorgan Chase reduced their stakes by 57% and 56%, respectively. GameStop is reportedly planning to buy Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. More details can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

Arkham CEO Miguel Morel to address Paris Blockchain Week on April 11, 2025, sharing crypto insights.
